body:
This is a patch of #193  where I had accidentally initialized the same array to multiple variables on one line. 

This shows a reduced convergence order (`1.5` instead of `2`) and a slightly decreasing convergence rate for the `GradientC2F` , with `f(z) = cos(z)` and `SetValue` BC (for which I commented the increasing rate check for now).

cc: @simonbyrne
title: More work on 1D FD space convergence tests
